Product Feedback: Really good MVP, excited to see where this goes.
Awesome app. Saved me so much on international transfer fees.
Transaction history takes a second to load sometimes, would be great to speed that up.
Very fast and reliable. Transferred funds in under 30 seconds.
Would be great to have an Android app so I can send money on the go.
The zero hidden fee structure is exactly what I was looking for. My bank was charging me 3% per transfer.
Freighter wallet integration was seamless. Took me less than 2 minutes to connect.
Please add more partner universities. My daughter's college isn't listed yet.
First-time parent here. The dashboard has a lot of information, maybe add a beginner mode?
Can you add email or SMS notifications when the student receives funds? That would help a lot.
The AI budget tool gave my son really practical advice. He's already spending more wisely.
I loved that I could see exactly where every rupee went. Total transparency.
I had a small connection issue the first time but after refreshing it worked perfectly.
The student spending breakdown is a feature I didn't know I needed. Amazing idea.
Would love a dark mode for the dashboard. Using it at night is a bit bright.
Compared to SWIFT transfers this is incredibly cheap. 10x better experience.
Works great on desktop. Hoping for a mobile-friendly version soon.
I was skeptical about blockchain at first but this made it so easy to understand.
Please add a feature to schedule recurring monthly payments. That would save me a lot of time.
Wallet setup was a bit confusing at first. Maybe add a short tutorial video on the setup page?
The Gemini AI expense analysis is genuinely insightful. My child can understand their spending now.
Please add a downloadable PDF receipt for every tuition payment for tax purposes.
The on-chain record-keeping gives me complete peace of mind. No disputes possible.
I compared this with three other apps and EduRemit was the easiest to use by far.
Support for multi-currency would make this even more useful for NRI parents.
Really appreciate that there are no intermediaries. Direct payment is the future.
The loading spinner doesn't always appear when a transaction is processing. Minor UX bug.
Stellar blockchain makes this so trustworthy. Every transaction is verifiable.
Would like to see a chat or help button inside the app for quick support.
My daughter's university confirmed receipt instantly. No more waiting 3-5 days like SWIFT!
Export to CSV for transaction history would be very useful for my annual accounting.
The university directory needs more institutions. Some smaller private colleges are missing.
Can you add SMS alerts when tuition is received? The university admin was asking for this.
The token balance updates in real-time which is great. No need to refresh manually.
Would love the ability to set a monthly spending limit for my student right from the parent dashboard.
The app could benefit from a simple FAQ section for first-time blockchain users.
As a student I love the AI budget advisor. It broke down my spending in a way I could actually act on.
It took me a while to find the expense logging feature. The navigation could be more intuitive.
I particularly liked the PostHog analytics integration — shows the team is serious about product growth.
As a student receiving funds, the XLM conversion to local currency step could be made simpler.
Excellent concept. Education remittance has always been painful and this solves it.
It would be great if you could add a payment confirmation email sent automatically to both parent and student.
The expense logging for students is a fantastic idea. Keeps everyone accountable.
Security is top-notch. I feel much safer using this than sharing bank account details.
The AI budget advisor actually gave me a specific tip to cut my food delivery spending. Very accurate.
Please consider adding a referral program. I want to recommend this to other parents in my building.

This is the kind of fintech product India needs. Keep building, the vision is clear.
The Sentry error tracking shows the team is proactive about quality. Impressive for an MVP.
